---
Phil Collins is a legendary British singer, songwriter, drummer, and producer known for his emotional ballads, powerful drumming, and distinctive voice. Rising to fame as Genesis' drummer and later as their frontman, he became a solo superstar with hits like *In the Air Tonight*, *Against All Odds*, and *Another Day in Paradise*.
My introduction to him was through the song "Another Day in Paradise". It still makes me cry when I listen to it, most of the time. Just like the first time. I mean, who sings about homelessness when everyone else sang about drugs, sex, women and love. But say what you will, how much ever I like Phil Collins, it is depressing to listen to him. Not that it is all bad. Just look at the hits.

Some might not agree! That's ok.
